outro_entry_level_match_notes.note: Programmatic level check is supporting evidence; human final assembly review still owns perceptual keep/tighten/reject.

rights_and_claims.notes: Uses registered Paper Architecture theme assets from the local music registry. Public release remains blocked until YouTube claim/status checks are complete.

vo_outro_blend_plan.final_voice_line: Next time: another design failure. Another system that taught itself to ignore what it already knew.
vo_outro_blend_plan.rationale: Keep Challenger-style full outro after the final spoken line while adding a low-level Paper Architecture theme prelap under the last VO phrase so the outro enters as a continuation, not a hard join.

audio_pronunciation_repair.caption_text_policy: captions_and_locked_script_text_remain_duplicate; only TTS render text used phonetic dupli-kate spelling
audio_pronunciation_repair.issue_reported_by_user: At active proof 00:03:52, duplicate was pronounced as noun dupli-cut; context requires verb dupli-cate.
audio_pronunciation_repair.original_script_sentence: Why duplicate safety with expensive hardware when the code was already proven?

living_cover_cues.title: One of them is wrong
living_cover_cues.treatment: warm right-rail effect map with source-art drift only

living_cover_cues.phrase: That rule is the safety architecture
living_cover_cues.title: Beam path must match
living_cover_cues.treatment: rail-safe effect map; no overlay on treatment room

living_cover_cues.title: No physical backup
living_cover_cues.treatment: typography cue and three-node rail map

living_cover_cues.phrase: The screen no longer matched the machine
living_cover_cues.title: Eight seconds
living_cover_cues.treatment: terminal-state cue in rail only; generated screen remains source art

living_cover_cues.title: Routine error
living_cover_cues.treatment: brief typography cue inside rail panel

living_cover_cues.phrase: No one was looking at the whole picture
living_cover_cues.title: Same behavior

living_cover_cues.phrase: The burden was on the failure
living_cover_cues.title: Proof reversed
living_cover_cues.treatment: right-rail effect map with no diagnostic source overlay

living_cover_cues.phrase: The Paper Architecture motif carries the end screen.
living_cover_cues.title: Music outro
living_cover_cues.treatment: music-only outro and static YouTube end-screen target geometry

sections.anchor: A patient lies on a table in a hospital treatment room.
sections.label: Opening Contradiction
sections.summary: A treatment room contradiction opens the case.
sections.title: Patient or Machine

sections.anchor: Radiation therapy works by aiming a beam of high-energy particles at a tumor.
sections.label: Dose Boundary
sections.summary: Radiation therapy depends on mode and hardware matching.
sections.title: The Narrow Margin

sections.anchor: The Therac-25 was not a new machine.
sections.label: Removed Safeguard
sections.summary: Proven code inherits trust from hardware that no longer exists.
sections.title: The Safety Net Removed

sections.anchor: The Therac-25's software had a flaw that only appeared under specific conditions.
sections.label: Race Condition
sections.summary: Fast edits expose a software state the console cannot admit.
sections.title: The Hidden State

sections.anchor: Here is how a machine earns trust it does not deserve.
sections.label: Trust Layers
sections.summary: Routine sessions train the system to believe the machine.
sections.title: How Trust Repeats

sections.label: Repeated Incidents
sections.summary: Separate hospitals see the same impossible injury.
sections.title: The Pattern Repeats

sections.anchor: The investigation that finally exposed the full scope
sections.label: Burden Shift
sections.summary: The case breaks open when testing asks how the machine can fail.
sections.title: The Burden of Proof

sections.anchor: The Therac-25 is now one of the most cited case studies
sections.label: Final Synthesis
sections.summary: The lesson moves from one machine to any system that grades itself.
sections.title: Trust Is Not Safety
